meaning: n.执行官,法庭监守,法警,监守者,地主管家的,镇长
examples: The court bailiff said jurors did not wish to speak to news media until the sentencing.
If the bailiff thinks that things could turn nasty he will enlist the help of the police.
The Bailiff said it had been a difficult couple of months for the Anglican Church.
Senator Bailhache, a former bailiff, has urged the archbishop to help resolve the situation.
